A.description: Query only — no sensor context, no guardrails

B.description: Query + raw sensor values — no SL annotations, no guardrails

C.description: Full pipeline — fused b/d/u + temporal decay + guardrails

D.description: No temporal decay — SL fusion + guardrails, stale data retained

E1.description: No fusion (vacuous) — decay + guardrails, all u=1.0

E2.description: No fusion (passthrough) — decay + guardrails, per-sensor b/d/u unfused

F.description: No guardrails — full fusion + decay, all intents permitted

G.description: No epistemic layers — raw payloads + guardrails (vacuous uncertainty)
